blurb.hr: Najprestižnija kubanska marka, izvorno stvorena za Fidela Castra i diplomatske darove. Duhan iz odabranih vega El Laguito prolazi dodatnu treću fermentaciju, po čemu je Cohiba prepoznatljiva po kremastoj, travnato-medenoj finoći.
blurb.en: Cuba's most prestigious marca, originally made for Fidel Castro and as diplomatic gifts. Tobacco from select El Laguito fields undergoes a third fermentation, giving Cohiba its creamy, grassy-honeyed refinement.

blurb.hr: Najprodavanija kubanska marka na svijetu, nazvana po romanu Grof Monte Cristo koji se čitao radnicima u tvornici. Klasičan profil kakaa, kave i cedra srednjeg tijela — mjerilo za habanose.
blurb.en: The world's best-selling Cuban marca, named after The Count of Monte Cristo read aloud to factory rollers. A classic medium-bodied profile of cocoa, coffee and cedar — the habano benchmark.

blurb.hr: Ne-kubanska Montecristo linija (Altadis) za američko tržište — dominikanska i nikaragvanska izdanja, glađa i blaža od kubanske.
blurb.en: The non-Cuban Montecristo line (Altadis) for the US market — Dominican and Nicaraguan editions, smoother and milder than the Cuban.

blurb.hr: Jedna od najstarijih kubanskih marki, poznata po punom, zemljano-paprenom tijelu. Serie D No.4 je definirala moderni robusto format.
blurb.en: One of Cuba's oldest marcas, famed for full, earthy-peppery body. The Serie D No.4 defined the modern robusto format.

blurb.hr: Aromatična, cvjetno-cedrasta marka koju je proslavio Winston Churchill (po njemu i istoimena vitola). Uravnotežena i pristupačna.
blurb.en: An aromatic, floral-cedar marca made famous by Winston Churchill (the Churchill vitola bears his name). Balanced and approachable.

blurb.hr: Ne-kubanska Romeo y Julieta za američko tržište — dominikanska izdanja, blaga i pouzdana.
blurb.en: The non-Cuban Romeo y Julieta for the US market — Dominican editions, mild and reliable.

blurb.hr: Marka iz Vuelta Abajo poznata po elegantnim, blagim i kremastim cigarama. Epicure serija je klasik za mirnija poslijepodneva.
blurb.en: A Vuelta Abajo marca known for elegant, mild, creamy cigars. The Epicure line is a classic for quieter afternoons.

blurb.hr: Bankarska kuća koja je postala marka — profinjeni, kremasto-cedrasti profil kave s mlijekom. Half Corona je savršena 'kava cigara'.
blurb.en: A banking house turned marca — a refined, creamy café-au-lait cedar profile. The Half Corona is the perfect 'coffee cigar'.

blurb.hr: Nekad ekskluzivni diplomatski dar, danas luksuzna marka finog, medeno-cedrastog profila s laganim začinima.
blurb.en: Once an exclusive diplomatic gift, now a luxury marca with a fine, honeyed-cedar profile and gentle spice.

blurb.hr: Nazvana po osloboditelju Simónu Bolívaru — jedna od najjačih kubanskih marki, zemljana i snažna.
blurb.en: Named after liberator Simón Bolívar — one of Cuba's strongest marcas, earthy and powerful.

blurb.hr: Jedna od najstarijih marki, srednje-punog zemljano-kožnatog karaktera i odlične vrijednosti.
blurb.en: One of the oldest marcas, medium-full with an earthy-leather character and great value.

blurb.hr: Insajderski favorit — bogato, tamno-voćno i kakao tijelo. Prva marka koja je koristila tiskane etikete i kutije.
blurb.en: An insider favourite — rich, dark-fruited, cocoa body. The first marca to use printed labels and boxes.

blurb.hr: Mala marka s odanim krugom obožavatelja — zemljano-medena, srednje-punog tijela.
blurb.en: A small marca with a loyal following — earthy-honeyed, medium-full body.

blurb.hr: Pristupačna kubanska marka (kratki filer) — rustikalna, zemljana, za svakodnevni užitak.
blurb.en: An affordable Cuban marca (short filler) — rustic, earthy, for everyday enjoyment.

blurb.hr: Jedina marka s isključivo perfecto (dvostruko šiljastim) oblicima — medeno-drveni kuriozitet.
blurb.en: The only marca made entirely in perfecto (double-tapered) shapes — a honey-woody curiosity.

blurb.hr: Najpristupačniji pravi kubanci (kratki filer) — grublji ali pošten svakodnevni dim.
blurb.en: The most affordable real Cubans (short filler) — rougher but an honest daily smoke.

blurb.hr: Nazvana po izvornom imenu Havane — bogata, srednje-puna marka s notama kave i kože.
blurb.en: Named after Havana's original name — a rich, medium-full marca with coffee and leather notes.

blurb.hr: Nazvana po legendarnom uzgajivaču duhana Alejandru Robaini — snažna, zemljana marka za iskusne.
blurb.en: Named after legendary tobacco grower Alejandro Robaina — a strong, earthy marca for the experienced.

blurb.hr: Izvorno stvorena za francusko tržište — najsvjetliji, cvjetno-travnati moderni habanos.
blurb.en: Originally created for the French market — the brightest, floral-grassy modern habano.

blurb.hr: Blaga kubanska marka prepoznatljiva po svilenom papiru na svakoj cigari — cvjetna i diskretna.
blurb.en: A mild Cuban marca recognisable by the tissue paper on each cigar — floral and discreet.

blurb.hr: Zino Davidoff postavio je standard luksuza; danas dominikanske i nikaragvanske linije slove za najprecizniju izradu na svijetu — od blage Signature do snažne Nicaragua i scotch-cask Late Hour.
blurb.en: Zino Davidoff set the luxury standard; today's Dominican and Nicaraguan lines are renowned for the world's most precise construction — from the mild Signature to the bold Nicaragua and scotch-cask Late Hour.

blurb.hr: Obiteljska legenda — box-pressane nikaragvanske cigare besprijekorne izrade. Serije 1964 i 1926 su mjerilo za maduro s notama kakaa i espressa.
blurb.en: A family legend — box-pressed Nicaraguan cigars of flawless construction. The 1964 and 1926 series are the maduro benchmark, all cocoa and espresso.

blurb.hr: Najpoštovanija dominikanska obitelj; Cameroon-omotane Gran Reserve i kultni, gotovo nenabavljivi Opus X uzgojen na vlastitom imanju.
blurb.en: The most respected Dominican family; Cameroon-wrapped Gran Reservas and the cult, near-unobtainable Opus X grown on their own estate.

blurb.hr: Value legenda iz Nikaragve — od kremaste Serie G do nagrađivane, bogate Serie V Melanio. Iz iste fabrike u Estelíju dolazi i sestrinski brend Nub.
blurb.en: A Nicaraguan value legend — from the creamy Serie G to the awarded, rich Serie V Melanio. The sister brand Nub comes from the same Estelí factory.

blurb.hr: Obitelj García (Don Pepín) — vlastiti duhan i vrhunska izrada. Le Bijou 1922 i Flor de las Antillas bili su Cigara godine.
blurb.en: The García family (Don Pepín) — own-grown tobacco and top construction. Le Bijou 1922 and Flor de las Antillas were both Cigar of the Year.

blurb.hr: Peta generacija uzgajivača koja opskrbljuje pola industrije; vlastite linije (Alma Fuerte, Alma del Campo) su organske, bogate i kompleksne.
blurb.en: Fifth-generation growers who supply half the industry; their own lines (Alma Fuerte, Alma del Campo) are organic, rich and complex.

blurb.hr: Najstarija nikaragvanska tvornica — Antaño 1970 je definicija snage stare škole, papreno i zemljano.
blurb.en: Nicaragua's oldest factory — the Antaño 1970 defines old-school power, peppery and earthy.

blurb.hr: Abdel 'AJ' Fernández — jedan od najtraženijih majstora blendera, poznat po bogatim maduro cigarama izvrsne vrijednosti (New World, Días de Gloria).
blurb.en: Abdel 'AJ' Fernández — one of the most sought-after blenders, known for rich value maduros (New World, Días de Gloria).

blurb.hr: Bivši odvjetnik koji je izgradio jedan od najprepoznatljivijih brendova; Decade i Vintage serije odlikuje odležani duhan.
blurb.en: A former lawyer who built one of the most recognisable brands; the Decade and Vintage lines feature aged tobacco.

blurb.hr: Bold honduraški brend (Davidoff grupa) — corojo linije su paprene i intenzivne, Connecticut blaža strana.
blurb.en: The bold Honduran brand (Davidoff group) — corojo lines are peppery and intense, Connecticut the milder side.

blurb.hr: Ernesto Perez-Carrillo, majstor iza La Glorije Cubane; Pledge je bio Cigara godine 2020 — tamna slatkoća broadleafa.
blurb.en: Ernesto Perez-Carrillo, the master behind La Gloria Cubana; Pledge was Cigar of the Year 2020 — dark broadleaf sweetness.

blurb.hr: Inovatori (Liga Privada, Undercrown, Acid) — Liga Privada No.9 je kultni tamni broadleaf gusta, uljasta dima.
blurb.en: Innovators (Liga Privada, Undercrown, Acid) — Liga Privada No.9 is the cult dark broadleaf of dense, oily smoke.

blurb.hr: Nicholas Melillo, bivši 'duhanski nos' Drew Estatea; Tabernacle je tamna, moćna broadleaf snaga, Charter Oak vrhunski value Connecticut.
blurb.en: Nicholas Melillo, Drew Estate's former 'tobacco nose'; Tabernacle is dark, mighty broadleaf power, Charter Oak a top-value Connecticut.

blurb.hr: Vidi Foundation Cigar Company — Nicholas Melillo, tamne broadleaf snage.
blurb.en: See Foundation Cigar Company — Nicholas Melillo, dark broadleaf power.

blurb.hr: Pete Johnson — kubanski stil iz Nikaragve, boutique kultni status (Havana VI, Miami).
blurb.en: Pete Johnson — Cuban style from Nicaragua, boutique cult status (Havana VI, Miami).

blurb.hr: Vlasnici slavnih Aganorsa duhanskih polja; svilenkast, slatko-začinski dim vrhunske sirovine (Supreme Leaf, Aniversario, La Validación).
blurb.en: Owners of the famed Aganorsa tobacco fields; silky, sweet-spiced smoke from premium leaf (Supreme Leaf, Aniversario, La Validación).

blurb.hr: Najstarija dominikanska tvornica — uravnotežene, aromatične cigare (107, 1903, Preferidos).
blurb.en: The oldest Dominican factory — balanced, aromatic cigars (107, 1903, Preferidos).

blurb.hr: Tradicionalna Tabacalera Palma — široka lepeza pouzdanih, aromatičnih cigara odlične vrijednosti.
blurb.en: Traditional Tabacalera Palma — a wide range of reliable, aromatic value cigars.

blurb.hr: Američki brend koji izrađuje Fuente — od kremaste Classic Connecticut do snažne VSG.
blurb.en: An American brand made by Fuente — from the creamy Classic Connecticut to the bold VSG.

blurb.hr: Vertikalno integriran obiteljski brend; wrapperi odležani u bourbon bačvama daju karamelno-čokoladnu notu.
blurb.en: A vertically integrated family brand; bourbon-barrel-aged wrappers add a caramel-chocolate note.

blurb.hr: Najprodavaniji blagi brend u SAD-u — kremasta, ultra-glatka Café linija idealna za jutro i početnike.
blurb.en: The best-selling mild brand in the US — the creamy, ultra-smooth Café line, ideal for mornings and beginners.

blurb.hr: Brend sklon eksperimentu (Brazilia, Flathead) — bogati maduro i neobični blendovi.
blurb.en: An experimental brand (Brazilia, Flathead) — rich maduros and unusual blends.

blurb.hr: Prensado je bio Cigara godine 2011 — honduraška dubina, kakao i začini.
blurb.en: Prensado was Cigar of the Year 2011 — Honduran depth, cocoa and spice.

blurb.hr: Dion Giolito — kubanski stil stare škole, rafinirane i aromatične boutique cigare (Epernay).
blurb.en: Dion Giolito — old-school Cuban style, refined aromatic boutique cigars (Epernay).

blurb.hr: Kyle Gellis — povratak kubanskom stilu stare škole, svijetle i kremaste boutique cigare.
blurb.en: Kyle Gellis — a return to old-school Cuban style, bright and creamy boutique cigars.

blurb.hr: Vidi Warped — Kyle Gellis, kubanski stil stare škole.
blurb.en: See Warped — Kyle Gellis, old-school Cuban style.

blurb.hr: Steve Saka (bivši šef Drew Estatea) — Sobremesa i Mi Querida su remek-djela balansa i tamne slatkoće.
blurb.en: Steve Saka (ex-Drew Estate CEO) — Sobremesa and Mi Querida are masterpieces of balance and dark sweetness.

blurb.hr: Meksički puro sa San Andrés duhanom — tamno, zemljano-čokoladno, priča o meksičkoj revoluciji.
blurb.en: A Mexican puro with San Andrés tobacco — dark, earthy-chocolatey, telling the story of the Mexican revolution.

blurb.hr: Christian Eiroa (obitelj koja je osnovala Camacho) — CBT maduro i 20 Years serije, honduraška dubina.
blurb.en: Christian Eiroa (the family that founded Camacho) — CBT maduro and 20 Years lines, Honduran depth.

blurb.hr: Maya Selva — honduraška elegancija francuskog stila, mekana i medena.
blurb.en: Maya Selva — Honduran elegance in the French style, soft and honeyed.

blurb.hr: Honduraška boutique zvijezda — slatko-začinski, moderni i inovativni blendovi.
blurb.en: A Honduran boutique star — sweet-spicy, modern and innovative blends.

blurb.hr: Artista Studio Works (Tabacalera El Artista, Tamboril) — petit corona u snopu od 8, umotana u „novine” s izmišljenim pričama iz fabrike. Pristupačan dnevni format, konkurent Cusanu i Don Tomasu.
blurb.en: Artista Studio Works (Tabacalera El Artista, Tamboril) — a petit corona in bundles of 8, wrapped in faux newspaper with tall tales from the factory. An affordable everyday format, rivalling Cusano and Don Tomas.

blurb.hr: Najrasprostranjenija blaga cigara u Europi (dostupna i u HR) — kremasta i pristupačna.
blurb.en: The most widespread mild cigar in Europe (available in Croatia too) — creamy and approachable.

blurb.hr: Švicarska kuća sa stoljetnom tradicijom — pouzdane value cigare za europsko tržište.
blurb.en: A Swiss house with a century of tradition — reliable value cigars for the European market.

blurb.hr: Royal Agio (Nizozemska) premium linija — odležani blendovi, europski specijalitet.
blurb.en: Royal Agio's (Netherlands) premium line — aged blends, a European speciality.

blurb.hr: Pristupačniji Davidoff brend — moderan nikaragvanski profil po razumnoj cijeni.
blurb.en: Davidoff's accessible brand — a modern Nicaraguan profile at a fair price.

blurb.hr: Global Premium Cigars Enriquea Sáncheza; ime nosi po godini 1502., kada je Kolumbo pristao uz obalu Nikaragve. Nikaragvanski puro blendovi (Emerald, Ruby, Black Gold, XO) prepoznatljivi po box-pressu i zatvorenoj nozi koja čuva arome.
blurb.en: Enrique Sánchez's Global Premium Cigars; named for 1502, the year Columbus reached Nicaragua. Nicaraguan puro blends (Emerald, Ruby, Black Gold, XO) known for their box-press and closed foot that preserves aroma.

blurb.hr: Suradnja Manuela Quesade i obitelji Plasencia — Casa Magna Colorado proglašena je Cigarom godine 2008. Nikaragvanski duhan uz dominikansko majstorstvo blendanja: bogato, zemljano, izvrsna vrijednost.
blurb.en: A collaboration between Manuel Quesada and the Plasencia family — the Casa Magna Colorado was Cigar of the Year 2008. Nicaraguan tobacco with Dominican blending mastery: rich, earthy, excellent value.

blurb.hr: Boutique kuća iz Nashvillea (Jon Huber) koja radi s najboljim fabrikama (My Father, Tabacalera Pichardo). Le Carême, Four Kicks i Mil Días — moderni klasici s pričom.
blurb.en: A Nashville boutique house (Jon Huber) working with top factories (My Father, Tabacalera Pichardo). Le Carême, Four Kicks and Mil Días — modern classics with a story.

blurb.hr: Nikaragvanski brend Maye Selve, sestrinski Flor de Selvi — tamniji i zemljaniji izraz kuće, iz doline Jalape.
blurb.en: Maya Selva's Nicaraguan brand, sister to Flor de Selva — the house's darker, earthier expression from the Jalapa valley.

blurb.hr: Osnovala su ga braća Chase; danas dio Davidoff grupe. Blagi do srednji dominikanski profili izvrsnog omjera cijene i kvalitete.
blurb.en: Founded by the Chase brothers; today part of the Davidoff group. Mild-to-medium Dominican profiles with excellent value.

blurb.hr: Artesano del Tobacco braće Fakih, izrađen u fabrici AJ Fernandeza (San Lotano, Ocotal). San Andrés maduro wrapper preko odležanog nikaragvanskog duhana; Belicoso je #10 Cigara godine 2023. (Cigar Aficionado).
blurb.en: Artesano del Tobacco by the Fakih brothers, rolled at AJ Fernandez's San Lotano factory in Ocotal. San Andrés maduro over aged Nicaraguan tobacco; the Belicoso was Cigar Aficionado's #10 Cigar of 2023.

blurb.hr: Vlastita linija legendarnog master blendera Davidoffa — čovjeka koji je desetljećima potpisivao njihove najcjenjenije blendove. Dominikanska preciznost i dubina u samostalnom izdanju.
blurb.en: The personal line of Davidoff's legendary master blender — the man behind their most celebrated blends for decades. Dominican precision and depth, now under his own name.

blurb.hr: Povijesna fabrika u Santa Rosi de Copán, danas u sastavu švicarskog Villigera. Blago-srednji honduraški profili tradicionalne izrade.
blurb.en: The historic factory in Santa Rosa de Copán, today part of Switzerland's Villiger. Mild-to-medium Honduran profiles of traditional make.

blurb.hr: Brend Kaizada Hansotije poznat po raskošnim, limitiranim izdanjima i neobičnim pakiranjima. Široka paleta od blagih do punih blendova.
blurb.en: Kaizad Hansotia's brand, famous for lavish limited editions and extravagant packaging. A wide palette from mild to full blends.

blurb.hr: Litto Gomez uzgaja vlastiti duhan u La Canela — dom najsnažnijih dominikanskih cigara. Andalusian Bull bila je Cigara godine 2016.
blurb.en: Litto Gomez grows his own tobacco in La Canela — home of the most powerful Dominican cigars. The Andalusian Bull was Cigar of the Year 2016.

blurb.hr: Koncept Sama Leccije u Oliva fabrici: kratko i debelo, tako da odmah uđeš u 'sweet spot' cigare — punina okusa bez sat vremena pušenja.
blurb.en: Sam Leccia's concept at the Oliva factory: short and fat, dropping you straight into the cigar's sweet spot — full flavour without the hour-long commitment.

blurb.hr: Brend losanđeleskog dizajnera nakita Matta Bootha — urbana estetika i suradnje s vrhunskim fabrikama (AJ Fernandez, Caldwell).
blurb.en: LA jewellery designer Matt Booth's brand — urban aesthetics and collaborations with top factories (AJ Fernandez, Caldwell).

blurb.hr: Maya Selva 'veliki osnovni' — ručno rađena honduraška cigara po cijeni strojne. Sumatra wrapper, habano vezivo iz Jamastrana, srednje tijelo.
blurb.en: Maya Selva's 'great basic' — a handmade Honduran cigar at machine-made prices. Sumatra wrapper, Jamastran habano binder, medium body.

blurb.hr: Artesano del Tobacco (braća Fakih) iz fabrike AJ Fernandeza — bogati nikaragvanski blendovi upečatljivih prstenova; Connecticut verzija za blažu stranu.
blurb.en: Artesano del Tobacco (the Fakih brothers) from AJ Fernandez's factory — rich Nicaraguan blends with striking bands; the Connecticut version covers the milder side.

blurb.hr: Honduraška marka iz Danlíja, danas u portfelju Scandinavian Tobacco Groupa. Poznata po pristupačnim, zanatski rađenim cigarama srednjeg tijela — Clásico linija važi kao jedan od najboljih omjera cijene i kvalitete u premium segmentu.
blurb.en: A Honduran brand from Danlí, today part of Scandinavian Tobacco Group. Known for affordable, well-made medium-bodied cigars — the Clásico line is regarded as one of the best values in the premium segment.
